raw_consumer_statement:
There were 4 fraud transaction made in XXXX in my account. I called HomeDepot to dispute the charges. The charges come back to my account in XXXX, and I called to re-open the case. They " claim '' I should be responsible for the charges after investigation. 

I opened the HomeDepot Card in year end XXXX, when I live in XXXX XXXX, XXXX. I moved to my new house in XXXX XXXX in year end XXXX, and then I never used the home depot card again. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, I got email notification for the fraud transaction in my account. I called to dispute the charges. Then I looked into my account. HomeDepot sent an new card to my previous apartment in XXXX. Then the fraud transaction happened. So I think someone with access to the mailbox of my previous apartment activated the card. We have moved out from the apartment for 2 years. We have no access to the card that HomeDepot mailed to us.
